title: Claude FM 🎵 music for thinking and building
summary: Claude FM is a curated music service designed to support focus during AI development and thinking tasks. It is made and curated by musicians specifically for the Claude community.
writeup: The video introduces Claude FM, a curated music service built to support focus during AI development and thinking tasks. It is made and curated by musicians for the Claude community. The takeaway: a dedicated listening option positioned for concentration while building and reasoning through work.
